# Spinning Drop Technique

**Summary**: A method to measure ultra-low interfacial tension between two immiscible liquids.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-hajiyev|Hajiyev, 2023]] used spinning-drop-technique to determine IFT of various surfactant formulations with LS crude oil.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The SDT allowed measurement of IFT from 10^-6 to 2000 mN/m, confirming low values for live crude systems. ([[2023-hajiyev|Hajiyev, 2023, p. 62]])
